metadata.description: Deployment channels and runtime surfaces for consumer, merchant, courier, partner API, and operations products.

channels.name: Consumer iOS App Store
channels.description: Consumer ordering, checkout, tracking, membership, and support app released through the Apple App Store.

channels.name: Consumer Android Play Store
channels.description: Consumer ordering, checkout, tracking, membership, and support app released through Google Play.

channels.name: Merchant Web Portal
channels.description: Merchant onboarding, catalog, order, ads, promotion, reporting, and payout workspace.

channels.name: Courier Mobile Apps
channels.description: Courier onboarding, dispatch, delivery execution, earnings, safety, and support apps.

channels.name: Partner API Gateway
channels.description: POS, merchant, retailer, ads, and enterprise partner API and webhook channel.

channels.name: Marketplace Runtime
channels.description: Backend runtime for order state, dispatch, pricing, risk, payments, data, and operational control.
